heading: The Genealogy of Adam
prose: Adam, Seth, Enosh,
Kenan, Mahalalel, Jered,
Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech,
Noah, Shem, Ham, Japheth.
The sons of Japheth — Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
And the sons of Gomer — Ashchenaz and Riphath, and Togarmah.
And the sons of Javan — Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim and Dodanim.
And the sons of Ham — Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
And the sons of Cush — Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raama — Sheba and Dedan.
And Cush procreated Nimrod — this one began to be a giant on the earth.

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: Mizraim procreated the Ludim, the Anamim, and the Lehabim, the Naphuhim

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: And the Pathrusim, and the Casluhim from where the Philistines came forth from there, and the Caphthorim.
And Canaan procreated Sidon his firstborn, and Heth.

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: And the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,
and the Hivite, and the Archite, and the Sinite,
and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
The sons of Shem — Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.
And Arphaxad procreated Cainan, and Cainan procreated Shelah, and Shelah procreated Eber.

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to
beget, bring forth, give birth to
beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: And to Eber two sons were procreated. The name to the one was Peleg; for in his days the earth was portioned. And the name to his brother was Joktan.

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: And Joktan procreated Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah,
and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these are sons of Joktan.

words.kjv_def: all, the whole, every kind of

prose: Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,
Eber, Peleg, Reu,
Serug, Nahor, Terah,
Abram — he was Abraham.
Sons of Abraham — Isaac and Ishmael.
These are their genealogies. First-born of Ishmael — Nebaioth, and Kedar, and Adbeel and Mibsam,
Mishma and Dumah, Massa, Hadad and Tema,
Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.
And sons of Keturah, concubine of Abraham — and she bore Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan — Sheba and Dedan.
And the sons of Midian — Ephah, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were sons of Keturah.

words.kjv_def: all, the whole, every kind of

prose: And Abraham procreated Isaac. The sons of Isaac — Esau and Israel.

words.kjv_def: beget, bring forth, give birth to

prose: The sons of Esau — Eliphaz, and Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
The sons of Eliphaz — Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz; and by Timna, and Amalek.
And the sons of Reuel — Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
And the sons of Seir — Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
And the sons of Lotan — Hori, and Honam; and the sister of Lotan — Timna.
The sons of Shobal — Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon — Ajah and Anah.
The sons of Anah — Dishon. And the sons of Dishon. And the sons of Dishon — Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

words.kjv_def: but, on the other hand, and

prose: And the sons of Ezer — Bilhan and Zavan and Jakan. The sons of Dishan — Uz and Aran.
And these are the kings, the ones reigning in the land of Edom before a king reigned among the sons of Israel. Bela son of Beor, and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

words.kjv_def: he, she, it, they, them, same

prose: And Bela died, and reigned instead of him, Jobab son of Zerah of Bozrah.

prose: And Jobab died, and reigned instead of him Husham of the land of the Temanites.

prose: And Husham died, and reigned instead of him, Hadad son of Bedad, the one striking Midian in the field of Moab. And the name of his city was Avith.

prose: And Shaul died, and reigned instead of him, Baal-hanan son of Achbor.

prose: And Baal-hanan died, and reigned instead of him, Hadad. And the name of his city was Pai. And the name of his wife was Mehetabel, daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.

words.kjv_def: am dying, am about to die

prose: And Hadad died. And The governors of Edom were — governor Timnah, governor Aliah, governor Jetheth,

words.kjv_def: am dying, am about to die

prose: governor Aholibamah, governor Elah, governor Pinon,
governor Kenaz, governor Teman, governor Mibzar,
governor Magdiel, governor Iram. These were the governors of Edom.
